Tests if the global object has the `hasOwnProperty` method.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if the global object has a property named `hasOwnProperty`. The `assert` function is used to verify that the `hasOwnProperty` method is not `undefined`, ensuring that the method exists on the global object. This is a narrow functionality script, primarily used for validation purposes to confirm the presence of a standard JavaScript method. The presence of this method is crucial for operations that involve checking the existence of properties on objects.
